params.name: Faraday's Dynamo
params.source:
* Lottery Machine (0.07%), Novice Scrolls (1%), Tool Chest (2%), Wishing (2.6%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (72k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
* [[Jiro Toyato]] - [[Rare Rent]]
params.description:
On Dec 18, 1831, Faraday invented the world's first electric generator.

Through electromagnetic induction, Faraday made a homopolar generator. Its mechanism is different from modern power generators. It does not contain a coil but a copper disc that rotates in the magnetic field. It has a handle fixed at the center of the disc. The edge and center of the disc are connected to a brush which connects it to the ammeter with a wire. The copper disc is placed in the magnetic field of the hoof-shaped …
